evals.prompt: Build a deterministic skill that a tiny quantized model can follow without guessing.
assertions: Generated skill contains CRITICAL RULES near the top
Generated skill includes exact verification commands

evals.prompt: Rewrite this paragraph to sound friendlier.
assertions: No deterministic skill package is needed

evals.prompt: Create an Agent Skill from this workflow and make it robust for dumb models.
assertions: Output contract requires front-loaded-AND-book-ended critical rules
Output contract requires an INSUFFICIENT-CONTEXT escape hatch
Output contract offloads math/counting to scripts

evals.prompt: Make this skill agentskills.io-compliant and validate its frontmatter.
assertions: Only allowed top-level frontmatter fields are kept (name, description, license, allowed-tools, metadata, compatibility)
version and author are nested under metadata, not at the top level
name is lowercase, has no leading/trailing/consecutive hyphens, and matches the parent directory
